programme.title: Luck
programme.desc: Musa, an underworld kingpin and a firm believer in luck, designs a series of life threatening adventure sports with hefty prize money for people around the world. However, the participants can only survive and win if they are exceptionally lucky.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega…
programme.desc: Jahnvi’s best friend Pooja attempts suicide when her boyfriend jilts her. Raj, a struggling singer, saves Pooja but she still goes into a coma and Raj gets stuck into caring for her. Upon recovery, Pooja falls for Raj, but he is in love with Jahnvi.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega…
programme.desc: Jahnvi’s best friend Pooja attempts suicide when her boyfriend jilts her. Raj, a struggling singer, saves Pooja but she still goes into a coma and Raj gets stuck into caring for her. Upon recovery, Pooja falls for Raj, but he is in love with Jahnvi.

programme.title: Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega…
programme.desc: Jahnvi’s best friend Pooja attempts suicide when her boyfriend jilts her. Raj, a struggling singer, saves Pooja but she still goes into a coma and Raj gets stuck into caring for her. Upon recovery, Pooja falls for Raj, but he is in love with Jahnvi.

programme.title: Udhaar Ki Zindagi
programme.desc: Sitaram is enraged when his son marries a girl of his own choice. Sitaram asks the couple to leave his house. Years later, his granddaughter comes to visit him with a gift from her father. The reason behind her parents' absence is shocking. What is it?

programme.title: Udhaar Ki Zindagi
programme.desc: Sitaram is enraged when his son marries a girl of his own choice. Sitaram asks the couple to leave his house. Years later, his granddaughter comes to visit him with a gift from her father. The reason behind her parents' absence is shocking. What is it?

programme.title: Udhaar Ki Zindagi
programme.desc: Sitaram is enraged when his son marries a girl of his own choice. Sitaram asks the couple to leave his house. Years later, his granddaughter comes to visit him with a gift from her father. The reason behind her parents' absence is shocking. What is it?

programme.title: Udhaar Ki Zindagi
programme.desc: Sitaram is enraged when his son marries a girl of his own choice. Sitaram asks the couple to leave his house. Years later, his granddaughter comes to visit him with a gift from her father. The reason behind her parents' absence is shocking. What is it?

programme.title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
programme.desc: College stud and a famed band player Ajay is introduced to the stunning daughter of a business tycoon named Ayesha. Ajay is smitten by Ayesha's modesty and coyness and what starts off as a mere acquaintance soon turns into full-blown love affair. But Ayesha's father Mr. Verma is unhappy with their union and his associate Mr. Chopra takes advantage of his discontentment. Mr. Chopra, wanting to take over Mr. Verma's fortune, suggests his own son for Ayesha and brainwashes him about Ajay. The situation takes a deadly turn when a hit-man is appointed to end Ajay's life. But seeing Ajay's aggressive stubbornness to be with Ayesha, Mr. Verma gives him a challenge, to find his lady-love within a day or leave from her life forever. Ajay accepts the challenge, unaware that a bigger conspiracy is at work to tear them apart once and for all.

programme.title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
programme.desc: College stud and a famed band player Ajay is introduced to the stunning daughter of a business tycoon named Ayesha. Ajay is smitten by Ayesha's modesty and coyness and what starts off as a mere acquaintance soon turns into full-blown love affair. But Ayesha's father Mr. Verma is unhappy with their union and his associate Mr. Chopra takes advantage of his discontentment. Mr. Chopra, wanting to take over Mr. Verma's fortune, suggests his own son for Ayesha and brainwashes him about Ajay. The situation takes a deadly turn when a hit-man is appointed to end Ajay's life. But seeing Ajay's aggressive stubbornness to be with Ayesha, Mr. Verma gives him a challenge, to find his lady-love within a day or leave from her life forever. Ajay accepts the challenge, unaware that a bigger conspiracy is at work to tear them apart once and for all.

programme.title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
programme.desc: College stud and a famed band player Ajay is introduced to the stunning daughter of a business tycoon named Ayesha. Ajay is smitten by Ayesha's modesty and coyness and what starts off as a mere acquaintance soon turns into full-blown love affair. But Ayesha's father Mr. Verma is unhappy with their union and his associate Mr. Chopra takes advantage of his discontentment. Mr. Chopra, wanting to take over Mr. Verma's fortune, suggests his own son for Ayesha and brainwashes him about Ajay. The situation takes a deadly turn when a hit-man is appointed to end Ajay's life. But seeing Ajay's aggressive stubbornness to be with Ayesha, Mr. Verma gives him a challenge, to find his lady-love within a day or leave from her life forever. Ajay accepts the challenge, unaware that a bigger conspiracy is at work to tear them apart once and for all.

programme.title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
programme.desc: College stud and a famed band player Ajay is introduced to the stunning daughter of a business tycoon named Ayesha. Ajay is smitten by Ayesha's modesty and coyness and what starts off as a mere acquaintance soon turns into full-blown love affair. But Ayesha's father Mr. Verma is unhappy with their union and his associate Mr. Chopra takes advantage of his discontentment. Mr. Chopra, wanting to take over Mr. Verma's fortune, suggests his own son for Ayesha and brainwashes him about Ajay. The situation takes a deadly turn when a hit-man is appointed to end Ajay's life. But seeing Ajay's aggressive stubbornness to be with Ayesha, Mr. Verma gives him a challenge, to find his lady-love within a day or leave from her life forever. Ajay accepts the challenge, unaware that a bigger conspiracy is at work to tear them apart once and for all.

programme.title: I Proud To Be An Indian
programme.desc: An Indian father-son duo goes to London for a family wedding. While in London the son, who is named I, finds out that his community is being threatened by white nationalists. Seeing this, he decides to stand up for his community and fight the racism.

programme.title: I Proud To Be An Indian
programme.desc: An Indian father-son duo goes to London for a family wedding. While in London the son, who is named I, finds out that his community is being threatened by white nationalists. Seeing this, he decides to stand up for his community and fight the racism.

programme.title: I Proud To Be An Indian
programme.desc: An Indian father-son duo goes to London for a family wedding. While in London the son, who is named I, finds out that his community is being threatened by white nationalists. Seeing this, he decides to stand up for his community and fight the racism.

programme.title: Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four slack and vagabond conmen learn about a hidden treasure from a dying thief and race against time to claim it. Meanwhile, they are also being pursued by a determined police inspector who is hell-bent on finding the treasure and keeping it all to himself.

programme.title: Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four slack and vagabond conmen learn about a hidden treasure from a dying thief and race against time to claim it. Meanwhile, they are also being pursued by a determined police inspector who is hell-bent on finding the treasure and keeping it all to himself.

programme.title: Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four slack and vagabond conmen learn about a hidden treasure from a dying thief and race against time to claim it. Meanwhile, they are also being pursued by a determined police inspector who is hell-bent on finding the treasure and keeping it all to himself.

programme.title: Raja Hindustani
programme.desc: A young taxi driver and a rich city girl fall head over heels in love with each other. Defying her family, she marries him and relocates to his village. But her family weaves a web of deception to split them apart.

programme.title: Raja Hindustani
programme.desc: A young taxi driver and a rich city girl fall head over heels in love with each other. Defying her family, she marries him and relocates to his village. But her family weaves a web of deception to split them apart.

programme.desc: A young taxi driver and a rich city girl fall head over heels in love with each other. Defying her family, she marries him and relocates to his village. But her family weaves a web of deception to split them apart.

programme.title: Raja Hindustani
programme.desc: A young taxi driver and a rich city girl fall head over heels in love with each other. Defying her family, she marries him and relocates to his village. But her family weaves a web of deception to split them apart.
